societyDetails.message:
Housing Society Solar Solution

Solar systems can significantly reduce your society's common area electricity costs. What is your monthly common area electricity consumption?

This includes lifts, pumps, lighting, security systems, etc.

societyResult.message:
Your Society's Solar Solution

Based on your monthly bill, we recommend a {societySystemSize}kW solar system for common areas.

  • Estimated cost: Rs. {societySystemCost}
  • After subsidies: Rs. {societyNetCost}
  • Annual savings: Rs. {societyYearlySavings}
  • Payback period: {societyPayback} years
  • Carbon reduction: {carbonReduction} tons CO₂/year

Would you like a detailed assessment?
